notes: MiniMax-M2.7-UD-IQ4_XS (unsloth dynamic Q4 quant, 4-shard 101 GB GGUF) on DGX Spark GB10 with llama.cpp `--spec-type ngram-simple` (n-gram speculative decode, draft-max=16, draft-min=1, p-min=0.5, ngram-size-n=4). Sherlock prose corpus, pp=128, tg=128, c=1, depth=0, n=30 trials, q8_0 KV cache. tokSOut = 30.98 tok/s (MEDIAN warm-pass, n=29 after dropping cold-start sample). Mean=31.00, std=4.00. AR baseline (no spec decode, same recipe) = 24.68 tok/s median; speedup = 1.255×. Tested all 5 llama.cpp ngram spec types: ngram-simple wins (30.98), ngram-mod 2nd (26.13), ngram-cache slower than AR (20.25), ngram-map-k and ngram-map-k4v crash in common_ngram_map_draft. Reproducer (Dockerfile + scripts + canonical result JSONs): https://github.com/my-other-github-account/minimax-m27-ngram-spec-spark — verified clean-from-scratch. By @banana_baeee.
